# PDS Education

> The Operating System for Modern Education

PDS Education is a high-performance, AI-native Institutional Operating System designed for the entire education ecosystem — EdTech startups, coaching institutes, test prep centers, skill development providers, K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. It automates administrative workflows, scales institutional governance, and provides 360° operational visibility through a unified multi-tenant platform.

## Who Is It For

- **Schools (K-12)**: Comprehensive management for CBSE, ICSE, and state boards with strict academic compliance.
- **Colleges & Universities**: Scalable infrastructure for higher education, from autonomous colleges to large university systems.
- **Coaching Institutes & Test Prep**: High-performance tools for competitive exam coaching centers and skill-development workshops.
- **Multi-Campus Groups**: Centralized governance for educational chains and multi-state institutional networks.
- **EdTech Startups**: Foundational stack for launching and scaling online learning platforms.
- **Skill Development & Vocational Training**: Powering vocational training and professional certification centers.

## Core Capabilities

- **Multi-Tenant Architecture**: Manage multiple branches, sub-brands, or independent entities from a single unified core.
- **API-First Delivery**: Robust backend services that can power custom frontends or integrate with existing stacks.
- **White-Labeling**: Complete brand ownership — deploy under your own domain, logo, colors, and email templates.
- **AI Intelligence (Guru)**: Built-in AI engine for role-based automation and real-time operational insights.
- **Revenue & Monetization**: Automated fee engines integrated with PayU and SabPaisa for INR transactions.
- **Bank-Grade Security**: Dedicated storage per organization, regular security audits, and full data isolation.
- **UDISE+ Compliance**: Automated compliance dashboard with government reporting.

## Platform Modules

- Academic Intelligence: AI-powered scheduling, timetable generation, attendance tracking, grade-book analytics
- Digital Treasury: Fee ledgers, multi-gateway payments (UPI, cards, net banking), real-time reconciliation
- Learning Management (LMS): Course builder, video engine with transcoding, question bank, AI quiz generation, test series
- Operational Wing: GPS transport tracking, barcode inventory, library catalog, facility management
- Enterprise Governance: Multi-campus RBAC, cross-institution analytics, audit trails, policy enforcement
- Growth & Admissions: Online applications, candidate management, website CMS, lead tracking via AI
- Student & Provider Profiles: Academic history, document vault, ID cards with QR, certificate workflows
- Compliance & Reporting: UDISE+ dashboard, AI compliance advisor, custom report builder
- Communications Hub: WhatsApp, SMS (MSG91), Email, Push notifications, broadcast engine
- AI Assistant (Guru): Context-aware help for students, teachers, admins, and parents

## Portals

- Admin/Operator Dashboard: Centralized operations cockpit
- Teacher/Provider Portal: LMS content management, attendance, assessments
- Student/Learner Portal: Mobile-first experience for timetable, assignments, tests, fees, certificates
- Parent/Guardian Portal: Fee payments, attendance tracking, communication

## Pricing

- **Starter** — ₹1,499/month (₹1,249 annual): 1 institution, 200 users, core platform
- **Professional** — ₹3,999/month (₹3,332 annual): 3 institutions, 1,000 users, full LMS + admissions
- **Enterprise** — ₹7,999/month (₹6,666 annual): 10 institutions, 5,000 users, transport + inventory
- **Plus** — ₹14,999/month (₹12,499 annual): Unlimited everything, white-label, API access, 24/7 support

All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

## Self-Service Onboarding

Any institution can go live in under 48 hours without team intervention:
1. Create account at rishividya.tech/register
2. Verify email
3. Choose a plan (14-day free trial)
4. Add payment details (optional, skippable)
5. Setup organization (name, type, location, theme)
6. Import data (auto-seed or upload Excel)
7. Go live with custom subdomain
